topic: HRV 用于耐力运动员训练负荷监控

pico.population: endurance athletes runners cyclists triathletes swimmers cross-country skiers rowers aerobic athletes
pico.intervention_or_exposure: heart rate variability HRV HRV monitoring heart rate variability assessment
pico.comparator: usual training no monitoring traditional load monitoring
pico.outcomes: training load training stress fatigue overtraining recovery performance adaptation internal load session RPE
pico.study_design_preference: RCT / systematic review / meta-analysis / clinical trial

searches.query: (("heart rate variability"[Title/Abstract] OR "HRV"[Title/Abstract] OR "heart period variability"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("endurance"[Title/Abstract] OR "athlete*"[Title/Abstract] OR "runner*"[Title/Abstract] OR "cyclist*"[Title/Abstract] OR "triathlet*"[Title/Abstract] OR "swimmer*"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("training load"[Title/Abstract] OR "load monitoring"[Title/Abstract] OR "training stress"[Title/Abstract] OR "overtraining"[Title/Abstract] OR "fatigue"[Title/Abstract] OR "recovery"[Title/Abstract] OR "performance"[Title/Abstract])) NOT ("rat"[Title/Abstract] OR "mouse"[Title/Abstract] OR "animal"[Title/Abstract] OR "in vitro"[Title/Abstract] OR "cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "patient"[Title/Abstract] OR "disease"[Title/Abstract] OR "sedentary"[Title/Abstract])
